reviews.comment:
¿Si vas a viajar y necesitas registro internacional? En 15 minutos lo tenés llevás tu registro arg vigente 2 fotos fondo celeste y $5200 y listo!!! Entrega en el momento excelente atención de  9 a 14 hs

(Translated by Google)
Are you traveling and need an international driver's license? Get it in 15 minutes! Just bring your valid Argentine driver's license, two photos with a light blue background, and $5200. That's it! Immediate service, excellent customer service from 9 am to 2 pm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNscGJMekJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para parar. Quizás es complicado el acceso si venis por colectora desde capital.  Y dentro de la estación, si no cargas combustible,  es raro para salir

(Translated by Google)
Good place to stop. Access might be tricky if you're coming from the city via the service road. And inside the station, if you're not filling up, it's difficult to get out.
